case_title: SALINA AHTYE VS. SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00<WAIVED>) SERVED JAN-30-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,500.00 FILED BY AHTYE, SALINA AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-26-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MONETTE BENITEZ, PRINCIPAL, SF PUBLIC MONTESSORI. FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT
TRIAL RESET TO MAR-16-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JAN-26-2023 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DONALD CHANG, THIRD PARTY ADMINISTRATOR & SENIOR CLAIMS EXAMINER. FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-16-2023 - JUDGMENT.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AHTYE, SALINA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER.(SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY AHTYE, SALINA SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AHTYE, SALINA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) KENNETH NEU, RISK MANAGER. FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-16-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-16-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM CARL CHAMBERLIN. PLAINTIFF SALINA AHTYE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY KENNETH NEU (RISK MANAGER), MONETTE BENITEZ (SENIOR CLAIMS EXAMINER) AND DONALD CHANG (THIRD PARTY ADMINISTRATOR & SENIOR CLAIMS EXAMINER). COURT FINDS DONALD CHANG IS NOT AN EMPLOYEE OF SFUSD THEREFORE HE IS UNAUTHORIZED TO APPEAR FOR DEFENDANT SFUSD BUT HE MAY APPEAR AS A WITNESS. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: CARL CHAMBERLIN; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
